summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RMS/ATS MVP. Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (17/17 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed all major features working including authentication, dashboard, kanban pipeline, compliance features, and RBAC. Minor UI element visibility issues identified but core functionality intact.

ui_bugs.issue: Two compliance cards (DPDP and POSH) not visible with correct test IDs
Action buttons (View Kanban Board, Manage Jobs) not found with expected test IDs

passed_tests: Backend API Authentication (register, login, get user)
Candidate Management APIs (create, read, update stage)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor UI test ID issues: 1) Add missing data-testid attributes for compliance cards (compliance-dpdp-card, compliance-posh-card) in ComplianceDashboard.js, 2) Add missing data-testid attributes for action buttons (view-kanban-btn, manage-jobs-btn) in Dashboard.js. These are cosmetic issues and don't affect functionality.
